title: Decision Record (L5)
description: One immutable file per decision (.okf/decisions/<decision-id>.yaml), recording rejection, deferral, withdrawal, expiry, and supersession identically to acceptance. prev_decision_id/prev_hash chain the record; the chain is a derived index and detects corruption or naive edits — it does not authenticate the writer. A fork (two heads after a sync merge) is diagnosed (OKF-DECISION-002), not treated as tampering.

authority_receipt.description: Pending the v0.8 receipt mechanism, the only honest values are a receipt locator (future) or the explicit disclosure string 'none (single-actor profile)'. disposition: self-accepted REQUIRES this disclosure.
